title: auriculardisia tarariae
side_effects: Auriculardisia tarariae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage, anemia, and digestive issues. Additionally, improper preparation and dosage can result in skin irritation, headaches, and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Auriculardisia tarariae for any health benefits.
